decisions: Interpret the request as removing both existing standalone routes: /quiz and /chords.
Preserve historical documentation, prior run artifacts, and shared utilities.
risks: Removed routes will return the application's normal not-found response for old bookmarks.

history.event: Planner scoped removal of both route segments, their route-local components, and shared navigation entry points.
Design Agent constrained the change to App Router deletion and removal of exactly two navigation items, with browser evidence captured before edits.
Builder removed the Quiz and Chords route-local files and their two shared navigation entries without changing unrelated runtime code.
Verifier passed lint, production build, route-manifest, source-reference, desktop browser, mobile browser, and removed-route 404 checks.
Design Critic approved the navigation subtraction against browser evidence and the product-craft-workbench profile.
Code Critic approved the minimal App Router and navigation deletion with no maintainability or correctness findings.
